what_it_does: Stores metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, pointing to a specific icon asset via a URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
standouts: target URI points to the Comment_Gold icon under design-assets/icons
record is timestamped with an added field
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured attachment metadata
Includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
File path mirrors the attachment id
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that catalogs an image attachment pointing to the Comment_Gold icon in the design-assets channel.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an image attachment record matches the content; it is a metadata stub with no payload.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, timestamped reference to a specific icon image asset within the design-assets channel.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped pointer to the Comment_Gold icon asset in the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record with id att-ac9db347 in the design-assets channel that references the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Comment_Gold and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make retrievable a specific icon image attachment within the design-assets channel.
